title: Happy Failure
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Happy Failure''''' was a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] operated by the [[Odea Aurora's mother|mother]] of [[Odea Aurora]]. She was killed by [[Glongfurrp]] after [[Toln ne Yerres]] discovered she was shipping goods stolen from his boss, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. The freighter lay abandoned in [[Port Town (Cloud City)/Legends|Port Town]] and was systemically stripped by [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]] before being converted into a [[Casino/Legends|casino]]. It was popular among the Bespinese.
